activities_projects.title: Detailed Character Sketch of Mme Loisel
activities_projects.objective: Analyse Mme Loisel’s character in detail
steps: Read all parts related to Mme Loisel
Identify her traits, desires, and flaws
Write a paragraph explaining her character
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth and clarity of analysis (15 marks)

activities_projects.title: Contrast Between Desire and Reality
activities_projects.objective: Understand the theme of desire versus reality
steps: List Mme Loisel’s desires
Compare them with her real-life situation
Write a short paragraph
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands central theme of the story

activities_projects.title: Role of the Necklace in the Plot
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the necklace as a turning point
steps: Identify scenes involving the necklace
Explain how it changes the Loisels’ lives

activities_projects.title: Character Comparison
activities_projects.objective: Compare Mme Loisel and Mme Forestier
steps: List qualities of both characters
Write similarities and differences

activities_projects.title: Mr Loisel’s Sacrifice
steps: Identify sacrifices made by Mr Loisel
Explain their importance in the story

activities_projects.title: Life After Losing the Necklace
steps: Recall changes in the Loisels’ lifestyle
Write a paragraph describing their struggles

activities_projects.title: Theme of Pride
activities_projects.objective: Analyse pride as a theme in the story
steps: Identify incidents showing pride
Explain how pride affects Mme Loisel

activities_projects.title: Alternative Ending
steps: Imagine Mme Loisel tells the truth immediately
Write an alternative ending

activities_projects.title: Message of the Story
steps: Reflect on the ending
Write the message conveyed by the author

activities_projects.title: Title Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the suitability of the title
steps: Think about the significance of the necklace
Write a paragraph justifying the title
